name: zk-shield-dex-backend
description: ZK Shield DEX — Privacy Trading Layer Backend

scripts.compile-circuit: cd ../circuit && (command -v noirup >/dev/null 2>&1 && noirup -v 0.31.0 || true) && nargo compile && mkdir -p ../backend/circuit && cp target/trade_proof.json ../backend/circuit/trade_proof.json && echo '✅ Circuit compiled and copied'
